label: Hustle Pak
blurb: Gig Economy, Creators & Solopreneurs. Micro-logistics, tax shielding, and platform arbitrage.

skills.label: Estimated Tax Safe Harbor Setter
skills.method: Scans incoming freelance 1099 payments on Stripe/PayPal, automatically moving 25% into a separate high-yield savings account to cover quarterly IRS payments.
trigger_examples: prevents freelancers from going bankrupt in april

skills.label: Multi App Mileage Deduction Tracker
skills.method: Pulls location data to calculate exactly how many miles an Uber/Doordash driver drove with a passenger vs. deadheading, generating the IRS standard mileage deduction log.
trigger_examples: saves gig workers thousands in taxes

skills.label: Freelance Scope Creep Flag
skills.method: Analyzes a client email asking for "just one more quick change," drafting a polite reply that notes the request exceeds the contract and offers a price for the add-on.
trigger_examples: protects solo graphic designers/writers from working for free

skills.label: Etsy Shipping Label Batcher
skills.method: Takes 40 weekend orders, checks box sizes, buys the cheapest USPS/UPS labels in bulk, and prints them in the exact order the items sit on the packing table.
trigger_examples: gives solo crafters their sundays back

skills.label: Food Delivery Multi App Arbitrage
skills.method: Analyzes incoming pings from UberEats, Grubhub, and Doordash simultaneously, accepting the highest dollar-per-mile run and auto-pausing the other apps.

skills.label: Airbnb Cleaner Turnover Sync
skills.method: The second a guest checks out, it texts the local cleaning crew the door code and the specific chores required (e.g., "wash sheets, check for pet hair").

skills.label: Craft Fair Sales Tax Locator
skills.method: Uses GPS to determine exactly which county/city a weekend market is in, automatically applying the correct 7.25% or 8.5% sales tax rate to the mobile Point of Sale terminal.
trigger_examples: prevents accidental tax fraud for traveling vendors

skills.label: Podcast Guest Prep Sheet
skills.method: Scrapes a scheduled guest's recent book, tweets, and articles, generating a 1-page summary and 5 unique interview questions for the host.
trigger_examples: elevates the quality of independent media

skills.label: Youtube Sponsor Ad Read Injector
skills.method: Scans the finished video timeline, finds a natural 60-second lull, and inserts the pre-recorded Manscaped/BetterHelp ad read, updating the timestamps for the description.

skills.label: Mobile Dj Playlist Bpm Matcher
skills.method: Analyzes a bride's Spotify request list, automatically grouping songs by Beats Per Minute (BPM) and key so the DJ has a mathematically perfect transition roadmap.
trigger_examples: makes amateur djs sound like club professionals
